PLAINTIFF'S CASE - ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. DEFENSE CASE - ORAL EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT ON EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. BODY ATTACHMENT VS. TONY WILSON IS PERMANENTLY STAYED.
JUDGMENT AGAINST TONY WILSON FOR $22187.44 TOTAL JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT WONG, RAYMOND DBA R & W UNOCAL #3 ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $1,140.81 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,140.81, DEFENDANT AWARDED $10,969.32 PRINCIPAL, $3,864.81 INTEREST $6,212.50 ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO A COST BILL
